description: Loads DJ Music context and starts REST API + Next.js panel for the dashboard

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"DJ Music Plugin active (42 visible MCP tools + hidden categories: delivery/discovery/curation/sync/platform/audio/memory). Skills: /build-set, /deliver-set, /expand-playlist, /curate-library, /review-set, /ym-sync. Commands: /panel, /panel-setup, /help. Use unlock_tools to expose hidden categories."}}'
